description: Fix merge clobber bug: downgrade ownership/DAG heuristic signals from auto-resolve to advisory-only, update agent prompts to require semantic analysis
Post-merge feature regression check: snapshot exports from both branches, flag missing symbols, auto-revert on regression
Put this project into solo mode
Currently the init process doesn't generate the DAG every time. We should fix this.
Fix lifecycle SVG line artifacts on sub boxes - remove 7 spurious line elements
The init command doesn't seem to be generating a set 0
Teach the roadmapper to include a foundation set (set 0) in its proposal when team-size > 1, and remove Step 9a from init SKILL.md
Add set naming convention (kebab-case slugs) and clarify foundation as reserved set ID
Remove index 0 language, fix init next-step message, add Developer Groups output format
Check if the documentation and changelog made the proper changes for this version
Commit all current unstaged/untracked changes on the dev branch and push to fishjojo1/RAPID (origin remote)
Fix the unknown display subcommand errors -- add display footer to USAGE text, TOOL_REGISTRY, and test coverage
Make RAPID footer responsive to terminal width - detect columns and render compact layout for narrow terminals
Commit and push to pragnition/RAPID main with the tag v6.2.0
Update documentation for v6.3.0 — bump all version references from v6.2.0 to v6.3.0 following bump-version.md instructions
Start the mission control server on port 9889
The mission control graph is still very ugly. The text overflows out of the boxes and the colour scheme is really bad. I want it to look hypermodern.
The size of the next action to take banner is currently too large. It doesn't render fully on most screens. We need to make it smaller/remove the banner
Bump RAPID version from 6.3.0 to 7.0.0 across all required files per bump-version.md
Bump the claude-plugin version to v7.0.0 too and commit and push
Add logging to the backend -- agent run lifecycle events, request middleware, autopilot and startup logging
When I click on the option in ask user question, it should glow/change colour highlighting that I selected it and THEN I can press submit
The activity tab in the agents tab does not have proper markdown rendering
print the word hi
When the agent that is spawned from the autopilot mode finishes its task, the tag on the kanban board should be changed from agent running to agent completed
Add autopilot-ignore toggle for kanban cards and replace inline card creation with a modal supporting title, description, and ignore checkbox
When creating a card meant for autopilot, choose which agent (quick or bug-fix) will act on it. When creating a kanban column, choose the default agent type.
Add Chat buttons to AgentsPage/AgentRunPage and implement persistent agent sessions (keep Claude subprocess alive between messages)
when the agents ask a question, we should NOT disconnect them till the question is answered
add-set shows a dropdown of current sets which is wrong behaviour. this should show a textarea for me to type

Rewrite /rapid:discuss-set --skip branch as a self-interview: agent asks itself the same Step 5/6/6.5 questions and answers them from codebase + CONTRACT.json + SET-OVERVIEW.md + ROADMAP.md evidence, producing a structurally full CONTEXT.md instead of a stub
when I launch the start-set agent, it needs to give me a dropdown of pending sets to start (in their canonical NOT alphabetical) order

Right now when the agent calls a tool and then continues on with its conversation the tool calls stack up like crazy below the message. We should solve this by simply having a drawer that expands into all the tool calls (which we can further expand).
currently the install breaks on many devices due to uv and the like not being installed. if this happens, the install agent should offer to install/tell the user how to install pip/uv
If you take a look at past rapid versions, a Made with :love: by @fishjojo1 appeared at the top of the readme. add that back in
